en.meta.index.title: LMW Travel | Luxury travel agent, Algarve & Portugal
en.meta.index.description: Private luxury travel advisor in Portugal and the Algarve — Vale do Lobo, Quinta do Lago, Vilamoura, Portimão, Albufeira. English, Dutch and Portuguese clients welcome.
en.meta.about.title: About Lynn | Luxury travel advisor, Portugal & Algarve
en.meta.about.description: Lynn Megan Wijngaard, private luxury travel curator for clients in the Algarve, Portugal, and abroad — bespoke journeys with trusted partner perks.
en.meta.whatido.title: What I Do | Bespoke travel, Algarve & worldwide
en.meta.whatido.description: Bespoke luxury itineraries, five-star hotels, cruises, and end-to-end curation. Based in the Algarve, serving Portugal, the Netherlands, the UK, the US, and more.
en.meta.benefits.title: Perks & partners | LMW Travel, Algarve
en.meta.benefits.description: Virtuoso and luxury partner benefits for travellers in Portugal and the Algarve: upgrades, credit, and VIP recognition where it matters.
en.meta.contact.title: Contact | LMW Travel, luxury travel Algarve
en.meta.contact.description: Contact LMW Travel for a private luxury travel agent in the Algarve, Portugal. WhatsApp, email, or call — expats, Dutch, and English clients welcome.
en.index.seo.heading: A private luxury travel advisor for the coast — and the world
en.index.seo.body: From Vale do Lobo, Quinta do Lago, and Vilamoura to Portimão, Albufeira, and Lagos, I help residents and expats plan exceptional trips with one dedicated curator. I work in English, Dutch, and Portuguese, whether you live in the Algarve year-round or are visiting Portugal.
en.about.hero.label: About
en.about.hero.subtitle: A private travel curator for clients who value discretion, detail, and effortless luxury.
en.about.bio.imgAlt: Lynn Megan Wijngaard, luxury travel curator
en.about.bio.heading:
A Passion for
Extraordinary Travel
en.about.bio.p1: Trips should fit the way you live, not the other way around. I build each one around your pace, your habits, and the small preferences that make a holiday feel like yours. By the time you arrive, I want the logistics to feel settled so you can simply enjoy being there.
en.about.bio.p2: I’m affiliated with Coastline Travel Group, which opens the door to stronger amenities, priority recognition where it matters, and relationships with partners around the world. A lot of what comes with that is simply not the kind of thing you’d match on your own from a booking site.
en.about.bio.p3: I spend part of my year in Portugal and part in the United States, and I work with clients wherever they are. You have one person beside you from the first spark of an idea to the day you’re home again.
en.about.values.heading: What Guides Me
en.about.values.quote: Luxury is zero stress, comfort, and a few little fun surprises along the way.
en.about.cta.heading: Let's Create Your Journey
en.about.cta.body: Share what you’re thinking, even if it’s just a rough idea. We’ll take it from there.
en.benefits.hero.label: Exclusive Advantages
en.benefits.hero.title: Benefits & Partnerships
en.benefits.hero.subtitle: Unlock exclusive perks, VIP access, and curated luxury through our trusted partners.
en.benefits.showcase.caption: LMW Travel, perks
en.benefits.showcase.heading: The Perks
en.benefits.showcase.desc: Handpicked perks and one-of-a-kind touches turn your trip into an experience.
en.benefits.compare.heading: Why Book With Me
en.benefits.compare.row5: Direct support before and during travel
en.benefits.cta.heading: Start Planning Your Journey
en.benefits.cta.body: Tell me what you’re planning and what matters most, and I’ll help map out the right next step.
en.contact.hero.label: Contact
en.contact.hero.title: Get in Touch
en.contact.info.heading: I'd Love to Hear from You
en.contact.details.heading: How I Work
en.contact.details.item1.title: Based In
en.contact.details.item1.desc: Based in Portugal, serving clients around the world.
en.contact.details.item2.title: Response
en.contact.details.item2.desc: Available at your convenience via WhatsApp, email, or phone, so we can bring your dream holiday into focus.
en.contact.details.item3.title: Getting to Work
en.contact.details.item3.desc: I will craft a curated proposal inspired by your vision.
en.contact.cta.heading: Ready to Begin?
en.contact.cta.body: Send a quick note with what you have so far, dates, destination ideas, and anything you already know.
en.whatido.hero.label: Services
en.whatido.hero.title: What I Do
en.whatido.specialties.heading: What I’m Known For
en.whatido.specialties.subhead: These are the trips I love to build, the ones where the details matter and the pace feels just right.
en.whatido.card.honeymoons.title: Honeymoons
en.whatido.card.honeymoons.desc: Romantic, yes, but never cheesy. I’ll choose the right hotel and the right room, then shape the days so it feels effortless.
en.whatido.card.cruises.title: Cruises
en.whatido.card.cruises.desc: The ship matters as much as the route. I’ll match you properly, then take care of the details around it so it all flows.
en.whatido.card.business.title: Business
en.whatido.card.business.desc: Tight schedule, no room for drama. I’ll keep it sharp, reliable, and comfortable, with backup plans ready if things shift.
en.whatido.card.lastMinute.title: Last Minute
en.whatido.card.lastMinute.desc: Leaving soon? Perfect. I’ll move fast, filter the noise, and lock in something that still feels considered.
en.whatido.card.friends.title: Friends Trips
en.whatido.card.friends.desc: Great trips with friends need the right energy. I’ll plan it so it’s fun, smooth, and nobody ends up organising the whole time.
en.whatido.card.family.title: Family Trips
en.whatido.card.family.desc: I’ll make it easy for everyone, the right room setup, simple logistics, and enough downtime so it actually feels like a holiday.
en.whatido.approach.heading:
Travel That
Revolves Around You
en.whatido.process.heading: How It Works
en.whatido.process.step1.title: Discovery
en.whatido.process.step1.desc: The discovery stage is where we become acquainted and thoughtfully explore your vision and desires.
en.whatido.process.step2.title: Curation
en.whatido.process.step2.desc: I will then curate a bespoke proposal, thoughtfully tailored to your needs.
en.whatido.process.step3.title: Refinement
en.whatido.process.step3.desc: During the refinement stage, we review any final details and thoughtfully explore alternative options where desired.
en.whatido.process.step4.title: Experience
en.whatido.process.step4.desc: Finally, you step into an experience thoughtfully crafted behind the scenes, with personalised touches that elevate every moment.
en.whatido.showcase.caption: LMW Travel, personal touch
en.whatido.showcase.heading:
Why Clients
Choose Me
en.whatido.showcase.body: A stay is never just a bed for the night. I take the time to learn what you actually care about, then I match you with places that feel instantly right. It should feel seamless and personal from the first message to the moment you check out, whether it’s last minute or something we build over time.
en.whatido.cta.heading: Ready to Start Planning?
en.whatido.cta.body: Share a few details (where, when, and what matters most) and I’ll follow up with next steps.

pt-PT.meta.index.title: LMW Travel | Agente de viagens de luxo, Algarve e Portugal
pt-PT.meta.index.description: Curadora privada de viagens de luxo no Algarve e em Portugal: Vale do Lobo, Quinta do Lago, Vilamoura, Portimão, Albufeira. Atendimento em português, inglês e neerlandês.
pt-PT.meta.about.title: Sobre a Lynn | Consultora de viagens de luxo, Algarve
pt-PT.meta.about.description: Lynn Megan Wijngaard, curadora de viagens de luxo para o Algarve, Portugal e o estrangeiro — viagens à medida com vantagens de parceiros de confiança.
pt-PT.meta.whatido.title: O que faço | Viagens à medida, Algarve e mundo
pt-PT.meta.whatido.description: Itinerários de luxo, hotéis cinco estrelas, cruzeiros e acompanhamento completo. Base no Algarve, com clientes em Portugal, Países Baixos, Reino Unido, EUA e mais.
pt-PT.meta.benefits.title: Vantagens e parceiros | LMW Travel, Algarve
pt-PT.meta.benefits.description: Benefícios Virtuoso e de parceiros de luxo no Algarve e em Portugal: upgrades, créditos e reconhecimento VIP quando conta.
pt-PT.meta.contact.title: Contacto | LMW Travel, viagens de luxo Algarve
pt-PT.meta.contact.description: Contacte a LMW Travel para curadoria privada de viagens de luxo no Algarve, Portugal. WhatsApp, email ou telefone — expats e residentes bem-vindos.
pt-PT.index.seo.heading: Curadoria privada de viagens de luxo no litoral — e no mundo
pt-PT.index.seo.body: Do Vale do Lobo, Quinta do Lago e Vilamoura ao Portimão, Albufeira e Lagos, ajudo residentes e expats a planear viagens com uma única pessoa de confiança. Trabalho em português, inglês e neerlandês, viva no Algarve o ano todo ou visite Portugal.
pt-PT.footer.copyright: © 2026 LMW Travel. Todos os direitos reservados.
pt-PT.about.hero.label: Sobre
pt-PT.about.hero.subtitle: Curadoria privada de viagens para clientes que valorizam discrição, detalhe e luxo sem esforço.
pt-PT.about.bio.imgAlt: Lynn Megan Wijngaard, curadora de viagens de luxo
pt-PT.about.bio.heading:
Uma paixão por
viagens extraordinárias
pt-PT.about.bio.p1: As viagens devem encaixar na sua vida, não o contrário. Eu construo cada uma ao seu ritmo, com os seus hábitos e aquelas pequenas preferências que fazem a diferença. Quando chega, quero que a logística já esteja resolvida para só ter de aproveitar.
pt-PT.about.bio.p2: Sou afiliada do Coastline Travel Group, o que abre portas a melhores amenidades, reconhecimento onde importa e relações com parceiros em todo o mundo. Há coisas que simplesmente não se conseguem igualar num site de reservas.
pt-PT.about.bio.p3: Divido o ano entre Portugal e os Estados Unidos e trabalho com clientes onde quer que estejam. Tem uma pessoa consigo desde a primeira ideia até ao regresso a casa.
pt-PT.about.values.heading: O que me guia
pt-PT.about.values.quote: Luxo é zero stress, conforto e algumas surpresas bonitas pelo caminho.
pt-PT.about.cta.heading: Vamos criar a sua viagem
pt-PT.about.cta.body: Diga-me o que está a imaginar, mesmo que ainda seja uma ideia vaga. A partir daí, eu trato do resto.
pt-PT.benefits.hero.label: Vantagens exclusivas
pt-PT.benefits.hero.title: Benefícios e parcerias
pt-PT.benefits.hero.subtitle: Aceda a vantagens exclusivas, tratamento VIP e luxo curado através dos nossos parceiros.
pt-PT.benefits.showcase.caption: LMW Travel, perks
pt-PT.benefits.showcase.heading: As vantagens
pt-PT.benefits.showcase.desc: Vantagens bem escolhidas e detalhes únicos transformam a sua viagem numa experiência.
pt-PT.benefits.compare.aria: Porquê reservar com a LMW Travel
pt-PT.benefits.compare.heading: Porque reservar comigo
pt-PT.benefits.compare.row5: Apoio direto antes e durante a viagem
pt-PT.benefits.cta.heading: Comece a planear a sua viagem
pt-PT.benefits.cta.body: Diga-me o que está a planear e o que mais importa, e eu ajudo a definir o próximo passo.
pt-PT.contact.hero.label: Contacto
pt-PT.contact.hero.title: Vamos falar
pt-PT.contact.info.heading: Tenho todo o gosto em ajudar
pt-PT.contact.details.heading: Como trabalho
pt-PT.contact.details.item1.title: Base
pt-PT.contact.details.item1.desc: Sede em Portugal, a trabalhar com clientes em todo o mundo.
pt-PT.contact.details.item2.title: Resposta
pt-PT.contact.details.item2.desc: Disponível via WhatsApp, email ou telefone, no horário que lhe for mais conveniente.
pt-PT.contact.details.item3.title: Próximo passo
pt-PT.contact.details.item3.desc: Vou criar uma proposta curada, inspirada na sua visão.
pt-PT.contact.cta.heading: Pronto para começar?
pt-PT.contact.cta.body: Envie-me uma nota rápida com o que já tem, datas, ideias de destino e qualquer detalhe que já saiba.
pt-PT.whatido.hero.label: Serviços
pt-PT.whatido.hero.title: O que faço
pt-PT.whatido.specialties.heading: Pelo que sou conhecida
pt-PT.whatido.specialties.subhead: Estas são as viagens que adoro criar, com atenção ao detalhe e ao ritmo certo.
pt-PT.whatido.card.honeymoons.title: Luas de mel
pt-PT.whatido.card.honeymoons.desc: Romântico, sim, mas sem clichés. Escolho o hotel certo, o quarto certo e desenho os dias para ser tudo leve e natural.
pt-PT.whatido.card.cruises.title: Cruzeiros
pt-PT.whatido.card.cruises.desc: O navio conta tanto como o roteiro. Eu faço o match certo e trato do resto para tudo fluir.
pt-PT.whatido.card.business.title: Negócios
pt-PT.whatido.card.business.desc: Agenda apertada, zero margem para falhas. Eu deixo tudo afinado, confortável e com plano B se algo mudar.
pt-PT.whatido.card.lastMinute.title: Última hora
pt-PT.whatido.card.lastMinute.desc: Vai sair já? Ótimo. Eu acelero, filtro o ruído e fecho algo que continua a sentir-se pensado.
pt-PT.whatido.card.friends.title: Viagens com amigos
pt-PT.whatido.card.friends.desc: Com amigos, o segredo é a energia certa. Eu planeio para ser divertido e fácil, sem ninguém ficar a organizar tudo.
pt-PT.whatido.card.family.title: Viagens em família
pt-PT.whatido.card.family.desc: Eu simplifico tudo para toda a gente, quartos bem pensados, logística simples e tempo para descansar.
pt-PT.whatido.approach.heading:
Viagens que
se adaptam a si
pt-PT.whatido.process.heading: Como funciona
pt-PT.whatido.process.step1.title: Descoberta
pt-PT.whatido.process.step1.desc: A fase de descoberta é onde nos conhecemos e exploramos, com calma, a sua visão e os seus desejos.
pt-PT.whatido.process.step2.title: Curadoria
pt-PT.whatido.process.step2.desc: Depois, eu preparo uma proposta à medida, pensada ao detalhe para si.
pt-PT.whatido.process.step3.title: Ajustes
pt-PT.whatido.process.step3.desc: Na fase de ajustes, afinamos os últimos detalhes e vemos alternativas, se fizer sentido.
pt-PT.whatido.process.step4.title: Experiência
pt-PT.whatido.process.step4.desc: Por fim, vive uma viagem construída nos bastidores, com toques pessoais que elevam cada momento.
pt-PT.whatido.showcase.caption: LMW Travel, toque pessoal
pt-PT.whatido.showcase.heading:
Porque me
escolhem
pt-PT.whatido.showcase.body: Uma estadia não é só um quarto. Eu percebo o que valoriza, e escolho lugares que fazem sentido para si. Do primeiro contacto ao check-out, tudo deve ser simples e pessoal, seja uma reserva de última hora ou algo que construímos com tempo.
pt-PT.whatido.cta.heading: Pronto para planear?
pt-PT.whatido.cta.body: Partilhe alguns detalhes (para onde, quando e o que mais importa) e eu envio os próximos passos.

nl.meta.index.title: LMW Travel | Luxe reisadviseur Algarve & Portugal
nl.meta.index.description: Privé luxe reisadviseur in Portugal en de Algarve: Vale do Lobo, Quinta do Lago, Vilamoura, Portimão, Albufeira. Nederlands, Engels en Portugees.
nl.meta.about.title: Over Lynn | Luxe reisadviseur, Portugal & Algarve
nl.meta.about.description: Lynn Megan Wijngaard, private luxury travel curator voor de Algarve, Portugal en internationaal — reizen op maat met betrouwbare partner privileges.
nl.meta.whatido.title: Wat ik doe | Maatwerk reizen, Algarve & wereldwijd
nl.meta.whatido.description: Luxe op maat, vijfsterrenhotels, cruises en volledige begeleiding. Gevestigd in de Algarve, met klanten in Portugal, NL, UK, US en verder.
nl.meta.benefits.title: Voordelen & partners | LMW Travel, Algarve
nl.meta.benefits.description: Virtuoso- en luxepartnervoordelen in Portugal en de Algarve: upgrades, tegoed en VIP-recognition waar het telt.
nl.meta.contact.title: Contact | LMW Travel, luxe reizen Algarve
nl.meta.contact.description: Neem contact op met LMW Travel voor privé luxe reisbegeleiding in de Algarve, Portugal. WhatsApp, e-mail of bellen — expats en Nederlanders welkom.
nl.index.seo.heading: Privé luxe reisadviseur aan de kust — en overal ter wereld
nl.index.seo.body: Van Vale do Lobo, Quinta do Lago en Vilamoura tot Portimão, Albufeira en Lagos: ik help bewoners en expats met uitzonderlijke reizen en één vaste contactpersoon. Ik werk in het Nederlands, Engels en Portugees — of je nu in de Algarve woont of Portugal bezoekt.
nl.about.hero.label: Over
nl.about.hero.subtitle: Private travel curator voor klanten die discretie, detail en moeiteloze luxe waarderen.
nl.about.bio.imgAlt: Lynn Megan Wijngaard, luxury travel curator
nl.about.bio.heading:
Een passie voor
bijzondere reizen
nl.about.bio.p1: Reizen moeten passen bij jouw leven, niet andersom. Ik bouw elke reis rond jouw tempo, jouw gewoontes en die kleine voorkeuren die het echt van jou maken. Tegen de tijd dat je aankomt, wil ik dat alles geregeld voelt zodat jij alleen nog hoeft te genieten.
nl.about.bio.p2: Ik ben aangesloten bij Coastline Travel Group. Dat opent deuren naar sterkere voordelen, prioriteit waar het telt en relaties met partners wereldwijd. Veel daarvan krijg je simpelweg niet op dezelfde manier via een boekingssite.
nl.about.bio.p3: Ik verdeel mijn jaar tussen Portugal en de Verenigde Staten en werk met klanten waar ze ook zijn. Je hebt één persoon naast je, van het eerste idee tot je weer thuis bent.
nl.about.values.heading: Wat mij stuurt
nl.about.values.quote: Luxe is nul stress, comfort en een paar mooie verrassingen onderweg.
nl.about.cta.heading: Laten we jouw reis maken
nl.about.cta.body: Vertel me wat je in gedachten hebt, ook als het nog maar een ruwe schets is. Vanaf daar neem ik het over.
nl.benefits.hero.label: Exclusieve voordelen
nl.benefits.hero.title: Voordelen en partners
nl.benefits.hero.subtitle: Ontgrendel exclusieve voordelen, VIP-toegang en gecureerde luxe via onze partners.
nl.benefits.showcase.caption: LMW Travel, perks
nl.benefits.showcase.heading: De voordelen
nl.benefits.showcase.desc: Zorgvuldig gekozen voordelen en unieke details maken van je trip een beleving.
nl.benefits.compare.heading: Waarom bij mij boeken
nl.benefits.compare.row5: Directe support voor en tijdens de reis
nl.benefits.cta.heading: Begin met plannen
nl.benefits.cta.body: Vertel me wat je plant en wat voor jou belangrijk is, dan zet ik de volgende stap helder voor je neer.
nl.contact.hero.label: Contact
nl.contact.hero.title: Neem contact op
nl.contact.info.heading: Ik hoor graag van je
nl.contact.details.heading: Hoe ik werk
nl.contact.details.item1.title: Basis
nl.contact.details.item1.desc: Gevestigd in Portugal, voor klanten over de hele wereld.
nl.contact.details.item2.title: Reactie
nl.contact.details.item2.desc: Bereikbaar via WhatsApp, e-mail of telefoon, op een moment dat jou uitkomt.
nl.contact.details.item3.title: Aan de slag
nl.contact.details.item3.desc: Ik maak een gecureerd voorstel, gebaseerd op jouw wensen.
nl.contact.cta.heading: Zullen we beginnen?
nl.contact.cta.body: Stuur me een korte boodschap met wat je al weet, data, bestemmingsideeën en alles wat handig is.
nl.whatido.hero.label: Diensten
nl.whatido.hero.title: Wat ik doe
nl.whatido.specialties.heading: Waar ik om bekend sta
nl.whatido.specialties.subhead: Dit zijn de reizen die ik het liefst bouw, waar details tellen en het tempo precies klopt.
nl.whatido.card.honeymoons.title: Huwelijksreizen
nl.whatido.card.honeymoons.desc: Romantisch, zeker, maar nooit overdreven. Ik kies het juiste hotel en de juiste kamer, en ik geef de dagen een moeiteloos ritme.
nl.whatido.card.cruises.title: Cruises
nl.whatido.card.cruises.desc: Het schip is net zo belangrijk als de route. Ik match je perfect, en regel alles eromheen zodat het klopt.
nl.whatido.card.business.title: Zakelijk
nl.whatido.card.business.desc: Strakke planning, geen gedoe. Ik houd het scherp, betrouwbaar en comfortabel, met een plan B als er iets verschuift.
nl.whatido.card.lastMinute.title: Last minute
nl.whatido.card.lastMinute.desc: Ga je snel weg? Heerlijk. Ik schakel snel, filter ruis, en zet iets neer dat nog steeds doordacht voelt.
nl.whatido.card.friends.title: Met vrienden
nl.whatido.card.friends.desc: Met vrienden wil je de juiste energie. Ik maak het leuk en soepel, zonder dat iemand steeds alles hoeft te regelen.
nl.whatido.card.family.title: Met familie
nl.whatido.card.family.desc: Ik maak het makkelijk voor iedereen, slimme kamerindeling, eenvoudige logistiek en genoeg rust zodat het echt vakantie is.
nl.whatido.approach.heading:
Reizen die
om jou draaien
nl.whatido.process.heading: Hoe het werkt
nl.whatido.process.step1.title: Kennismaking
nl.whatido.process.step1.desc: In de kennismaking leren we elkaar kennen en verkennen we jouw wensen en ideeën.
nl.whatido.process.step2.title: Curatie
nl.whatido.process.step2.desc: Daarna maak ik een voorstel op maat, met oog voor detail.
nl.whatido.process.step3.title: Fijnslijpen
nl.whatido.process.step3.desc: We scherpen de laatste details aan en bekijken alternatieven waar nodig.
nl.whatido.process.step4.title: Beleven
nl.whatido.process.step4.desc: En dan begint de reis, zorgvuldig opgebouwd achter de schermen, met persoonlijke touches die het verschil maken.
nl.whatido.showcase.caption: LMW Travel, persoonlijke touch
nl.whatido.showcase.heading:
Waarom klanten
voor mij kiezen
nl.whatido.showcase.body: Een verblijf is meer dan een bed. Ik leer wat jij echt belangrijk vindt, en kies plekken die meteen goed voelen. Van het eerste bericht tot het uitchecken moet het persoonlijk en soepel zijn, of het nu last minute is of iets dat we rustig opbouwen.
nl.whatido.cta.heading: Klaar om te plannen?
nl.whatido.cta.body: Deel een paar details (waarheen, wanneer en wat belangrijk is), dan stuur ik je de volgende stappen.
